title: NTILE window function returns incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE employees (dep VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, salary DOUBLE PRECISION CHECK (salary > 0), hire_date DATE DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO employees (dep, name, salary, hire_date) VALUES ('mgmt', 'Smith', 81, TO_DATE('10-08-2019', 'DD-MM-YYYY'));
INSERT INTO employees (dep, name, salary, hire_date) VALUES ('dev', 'Jones', 55, TO_DATE('09-08-2019', 'DD-MM-YYYY'));
SELECT dep, name, salary, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date DESC) FROM employees;
SELECT dep, name, salary, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) FROM employees WHERE salary IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: NTILE window function with incorrect ordering of hire_date
